Our Story

We Create Events That

Leave an Impression

Ellora Event Management was born from a passion for turning ordinary occasions into extraordinary memories. We combine meticulous planning with creative vision to deliver events that resonate long after the last guest has left.

From intimate weddings to grand corporate gatherings, every event we handle is infused with our signature attention to detail, premium aesthetics, and flawless coordination — because you deserve nothing less.

What We Offer

Our Services

Whether it's an intimate gathering or a grand spectacle, we bring the same dedication and expertise to every event we touch.

View Service →

Elegant · Timeless · Yours

Wedding Planning

From intimate ceremonies to grand celebrations, we craft weddings that reflect your unique love story with elegance and flawless precision.

Learn More
View Service →

Professional · Seamless · Impactful

Corporate Events

Product launches, annual days, conferences and brand activations executed with professional finesse and seamless coordination.

Learn More
View Service →

Breathtaking · Custom · Premium

Stage & Decor

Breathtaking stage designs and premium décor — from floral arrangements to full production setups — that set the perfect tone.

Learn More
View Service →

Exquisite · Curated · Memorable

Catering

Exquisite culinary experiences tailored to your event — from elegant plated dinners to lavish buffet spreads crafted by master chefs.

Learn More
View Service →

Captivating · Large-Scale · Strategic

Exhibitions

Large-scale exhibitions and trade shows designed to maximise footfall, brand visibility, and audience engagement.

Learn More
View Service →

Magical · Themed · Joyful

Birthday Parties

Themed, styled and coordinated milestone celebrations — from concept through to the last confetti fall — crafted for pure joy.

Learn More
View Service →

Warm · Elegant · Flawless

Social Functions

Receptions, cultural functions and social gatherings brought to life with warmth, creativity and impeccable hospitality.

Learn More

Destination Events

We Plan Events Across India & Beyond

Dream of a wedding on the backwaters of Kerala? A corporate retreat in the palaces of Rajasthan? A milestone celebration in the hills of Shimla?

Ellora specialises in full destination event management — handling venue scouting, travel logistics, guest coordination, local vendor management, and on-ground execution at any location across India.

GoaRajasthanKeralaUdaipurShimla+ Many More
Explore Destination Events

Goa

Rajasthan

Kerala

TravelWell

Sister Platform

Planning Travel for

Your Event?

For destination events, outstation guests, or travel packages tied to your celebration — visit our sister platform TravelWell Delight.

Book flights, hotels, tour packages, and event travel for your guests — all in one place. Seamlessly integrated with your Ellora event planning.

Hotel Stays
Tour Packages

Your Complete

Flights for all your outstation guests

WHY CHOOSE US

What Sets Ellora Apart

01

Premium Aesthetics

Every visual element is curated with an artist's eye — from florals to lighting, we create spaces that look extraordinary and feel magical.

02

On-Time Delivery

Timelines are sacred to us. Meticulous planning ensures every event unfolds exactly as envisioned, without a single minute's delay.

03

Expert Team

Our seasoned team brings years of hands-on experience across all event types, handling every complexity with calm professionalism.

04

Client-Centric

Your vision is our blueprint. We listen deeply, collaborate closely, and go above and beyond to bring your dream event to life.
